caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on systems thinking and its applications. The main screen displays a visual map with interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts or ideas related to "buying" and "selling," as well as "seeking systems thinking." A smaller inset shows a presenter, Gene Bellinger, who is speaking and gesturing, presumably explaining the content of the visual map. In the background, there is an image of people shopping in what looks like a warehouse store, possibly illustrating a real-world example of the concepts being discussed. The overall setting suggests an educational or professional context, with the presenter using both visual aids and verbal explanations to convey complex ideas.
